author: terencechain
content: All three prysm nodes rejected teku's slot-1216 self-build envelope (signature did not verify, the first gloas slot). Either teku signs the first post-fork envelope with the pre-fork domain or prysm's self-build verification picks the wrong domain at the boundary. Did anyone else see this?
